## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 bullet points. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New skill (adds a new skill to the plugin)
- [ ] Skill update (changes behavior of an existing skill)
- [ ] Documentation (no functional changes)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes, no new features)

## Skills affected

<!-- Which skills does this PR touch? e.g. note-rename, inbox-sort, property-enrich -->

## Checklist

- [ ] SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter (`name`, `description`)
- [ ] Description includes 3+ trigger phrases
- [ ] No hardcoded vault paths (uses `${OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH}`)
- [ ] Output format follows Core + Nahbereich + Report
- [ ] Tested on a local vault (not production)
- [ ] No emoji in skill files
